artPrompt: A dramatic sorcery moment as a stagnant reservoir erupts into thriving toxic life, vivid sickly-green algae swirling and frothing across the water's surface, bioluminescent tendrils creeping over a rusted pipe and swallowing a blank illegible warning placard whole. Bruised stormy sky above the crumbling treatment plant. The blooming green spreads up the wide frame from sludgy base. Wide 4:3 landscape, Gruul murky green and rust red, toxic menace, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Algae Bloom
text: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. The pond water is now green and alive and frankly thriving.
flavorText: The health department posted a sign. The algae ate the sign.
